name: Bezente Assorted Rainbow Latex Balloons, 100 Pack 12 inch Round Helium Bright Color Balloons for Birthday Bridal Shower Wedding Party Decorations
bullets: 【Rainbow Themed Party】- Assorted balloons can be used in rainbow themed party or mix with any color to create a perfect rainbow themed wedding, graduations party, birthday party, bridal shower and any themed party inside or outside, which makes your party more special.
【Premium Quality】- Colorful balloons are made from premium latex material which is durable and long-lasting quality with no smell, safe to use around children.

【Set Includes】- Each sets contains 100pcs assorted party balloons of 12 inches 10 colors ( red, yellow, royal blue, light blue, lime green, light green, pink, purple, dark purple, orange) and 1pcs white ribbon (33 feet total).The right amount quantity and most suitable color for each party decoration.

【Warm Tips】- Multicolored Party Balloons can be inflated with air or helium. The best floating time for helium balloons is no longer than 24 hours. Matching with other balloons is also a good idea for your balloon party decoration.

【We Are Always Ready to Help】- We are very confident with the quality of our assorted rainbow balloons for we used grade A quality materials. Its production process is being monitored to secure its quality. If you have any problems or unsatisfied, please email us first. We are always here for you in 24 hours.

reviews.name: Julia D.
reviews.title: Great Quality!
reviews.body: These are great quality for the price! Got these for decorating for a birthday and they held up so good! We popped all but four a week after the birthday, and the four we left for our daughter to play with were still full of air almost 5 weeks later! I was shocked! We ultimately had to pop them ourselves since they didn’t run out of air, and I needed them gone, lol. Amazing quality and super cute…

reviews.name: Father of 4
reviews.title: High quality colorful balloons!
reviews.body: This was a great purchase! I will never buy my balloons from anywhere else. The 150 pack of balloons came in 10 different colors with 15 of each color. I counted them. (It’s so frustrating to buy a pack of balloons only to have like 20 of one color and only 3 of another.) This pack gives you an equal amount of each color. And colors anre brilliant. Every single balloon was thick and high quality.…

reviews.name: Yelitza Bozo
reviews.title: Globos amarillos
reviews.body: Very good 18-inch yellow balloons. They are strong, easy to inflate, and the color is bright and beautiful. Perfect for any party decoration

reviews.name: Bobby  W.
reviews.title: Quality Balloons
reviews.body: Never thought I'd need let alone write a review about the humble balloon, but a need arose, and here's my review.These are quality balloons, better than what I remember from similar products in times way back.They are made out of good material (uniform and odor free), and they can be inflated pretty easily using breath alone if needed (provided one's lungs are up to the task). I was able to tie…
